programs.title: Mortal Kombat
programs.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programs.title: John McCain: For Whom the Bell Tolls
programs.desc: The six-term senior Arizona senator provides unprecedented access to his daily life in Washington, D.C., and Sedona, Ariz., as he reflects upon his many years of service to his country and battles advancing health issues.

programs.title: Ghosts of Abu Ghraib
programs.desc: Filmmaker Rory Kennedy examines the abuse of inmates at an Iraqi prison.

programs.title: Twister
programs.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programs.title: Insidious
programs.desc: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

programs.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programs.desc: Brilliant parapsychologist Elise Rainier receives a disturbing phone call from a man who claims that his house is haunted. Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.
